skipped.message: need --run-long option to run long-running correctness tests

testcase.name: test_load_hidden_units_renumbers_correctly

error.message: failed on setup with "Failed: Timeout (>180.0s) from pytest-timeout."

testcase.error: src/tests/unit/test_snapshot_serializer_coverage.py:52: in network_with_hidden_units simple_network.fit(x, y, epochs=5) src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1153: in fit self.grow_network( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:2765: in grow_network if not (training_results := self._get_training_results(x_train=x_train, y_train=y_train, residual_error=residual_error)) or not training_results.best_candidate: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:2913: in _get_training_results training_results = self.train_candidates(x=x_train, y=y_train, residual_error=residual_error) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1365: in train_candidates results = self._execute_candidate_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1492: in _execute_candidate_training results = self._execute_parallel_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1625: in _execute_parallel_training self._stop_workers(workers, task_queue) src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1717: in _stop_workers worker.join(timeout=15) # Increased from 10 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/process.py:156: in join res = self._popen.wait(timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/popen_fork.py:41: in wait if not wait([self.sentinel], timeout): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/connection.py:1165: in wait ready = selector.select(timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/selectors.py:398: in select fd_event_list = self._selector.poll(timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E Failed: Timeout (>180.0s) from pytest-timeout.

testcase.name: test_validate_format_hidden_units_count_mismatch

error.message: failed on setup with "Failed: Timeout (>180.0s) from pytest-timeout."

testcase.error: src/tests/unit/test_snapshot_serializer_coverage.py:52: in network_with_hidden_units simple_network.fit(x, y, epochs=5) src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1153: in fit self.grow_network( src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:2765: in grow_network if not (training_results := self._get_training_results(x_train=x_train, y_train=y_train, residual_error=residual_error)) or not training_results.best_candidate: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:2913: in _get_training_results training_results = self.train_candidates(x=x_train, y=y_train, residual_error=residual_error) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1365: in train_candidates results = self._execute_candidate_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1492: in _execute_candidate_training results = self._execute_parallel_training(tasks, process_count) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1621: in _execute_parallel_training results = self._collect_training_results(result_queue, len(tasks)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ src/cascade_correlation/cascade_correlation.py:1680: in _collect_training_results result = result_queue.get(timeout=request_timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <string>:2: in get ??? /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/managers.py:832: in _callmethod kind, result = conn.recv() ^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/connection.py:256: in recv buf = self._recv_bytes() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/connection.py:447: in _recv_bytes buf = self._recv(4) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /opt/miniforge3/envs/JuniperCascor/lib/python3.14/multiprocessing/connection.py:412: in _recv chunk = read(handle, to_read) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E Failed: Timeout (>180.0s) from pytest-timeout.
